title: stenogyne scrophularioides
intro: Stenogyne scrophularioides, also known as Hawaiian mint or ma'o hau hele, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Stenogyne scrophularioides include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
